final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a French romantic bedroom scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 法式浪漫 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a four-poster bed with sheer canopy, vintage dressing table, scattered rose petals
Scene/backdrop: must include Paris street view visible through the window
Lighting/mood: must be soft morning light with an elegant and lazy atmosphere
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
